title: Luffy Reaches Noah
description: On pages 1–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7. The core beat is luffy reaches noah.
scene: The scene follows luffy reaches noah, keeping the focus on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: How dare you indirectly assault Nami!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Watch out!! All kinds of crazy stuff appears out of that staff of hers!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: At least call me a "magical cutie"!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!! That's hot!! Don't come near me, you guys!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You'll turn me into dried squid!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: That damn woman's doing this, is she?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: that man in the black suit was overreacting to the slightest attack on that woman!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She must be the weak point of their crew!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll hold down her legs!! While she's trapped, you take her out with your Lance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: What's this?! My legs... they won't move!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Feel the pain of my dried squid Lance!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: You're going to be dried squid!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...?!! Hold on a minute!! Why won't my legs move?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Eh?! Nami- San?! Ah! I know!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Would you perchance allow me to see your-

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, it doesn't matter... I'll just have to dry you out into dried squid as well!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What's wrong, my dried squid Lance?! Hurry up and drain all the water out of this fool!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Hey, isn't there anyone around here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Guoohhhh hh...!! who is it this time ?!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: OHhh... you're one of the big shots, right?

summary: Luffy Reaches Noah. This part advances Fish-Man Island’s history and present conflict, tying Otohime and Fisher Tiger’s legacy to Hody’s threat.
